title: S7 - Autonomy collapse: Done quick-tasks strip + engine lock

beats.caption: AC1 - Done groups quick tasks under a collapsed strip (count 3)
beats.expectedScreen: the Done column with a collapsed 'quick tasks' strip and a count badge reading 3

beats.caption: AC2 - Expanding the strip reveals the quick cards
beats.expectedScreen: the expanded quick-tasks strip listing the quick card 'Rename staleTimeout to idleTimeout'

beats.caption: AC3 - The engine card in Review is engine-owned (locked, no Move control)
beats.expectedScreen: the running card in Review showing an 'engine-owned' chip and a running pill, with only Watch/Open
